title: URL Health Check
description: Pings a user-supplied URL and reports its HTTP status and latency.

permissions.reason: Used by `ops.url-health-check.ping` to GET a user-supplied URL whose host is under the declared registrable domains.
Used by `ops.url-health-check.ping` to measure elapsed wall-clock time around the request.

actions.description: Issues a GET to the supplied URL and returns status code plus elapsed latency.
